suspicious_activity.narrative: Tracy Lewis, DOB 1966-10-26, residing at 8016 Nicole Stream Suite 650, Williamsside, ID, engaged in suspicious structuring activity. From 2025-07-25 to 2025-07-31, Lewis made seven cash deposits totaling $67,569.06, each just below $10,000, at various branches including University District and Southpark Ave. This pattern suggests an attempt to evade CTR filing requirements. Lewis's occupation is a nurse with an annual income of $131,925, which does not align with the volume and frequency of these transactions. Account IDs involved include CUST_0053_ACC_1 and CUST_0053_ACC_3. The activity raises concerns under BSA regulations.
suspicious_activity.ai_reasoning: Numerous cash deposits just below $10,000 over consecutive days indicate potential structuring to avoid reporting requirements.
